self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can present queue lifecycle state more truthfully when routed entries stop looking like clean active routing after the live case head has already progressed or broken.
self_improvement.mechanism: The adopted slice retains one routed-status guard driven by canonical current-head truth.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP opener, many queue entries kept showing raw routed status even when the live current head had already moved past the recorded downstream stub.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The queue surface will stop overstating active routing while preserving still-live routed stubs and raw queue evidence.

decision.rationale: The slice is small, operator-visible, and directly aligned with the remaining queue lifecycle mismatch bottleneck.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
